wall_enforcement.note: load_wide correctly rejects OOS end: WALL VIOLATION: end 2025-01-01 >= DEV_END 2024-05-15

dev_max_date.note: DEV lab does not include OOS data

oos_validate_wall.note: oos_validate correctly rejects pre-DEV start: oos_start 2020-01-01 must be >= DEV_END 2024-05-15

no_refit_guarantee.mechanism: FROZEN_CONFIG is a module-level constant; oos_validate takes no training data arg; regime thresholds are structural (0.5 breadth, 0 trend) not fitted
no_refit_guarantee.note: Regime gate thresholds are structural (mean-based) not empirically optimized

cautions: HIGH REGIME LAG: mean bear-entry lag 23.5 bars. Strategy will hold losing positions ~23.5 days before gating to cash.
WHIPSAW RISK: 55.6% of bear episodes are <= 10 bars. Cost drag from frequent regime flips.
Seed robustness OK: all 10 seeds positive net. Edge std across seeds: 0.012pp.
BEAR: ALL components (mom14, brk14, liq-flush amplifier) are DEAD or NEGATIVE in bear. The regime gate MUST be active to avoid bear losses. Gate failure = full beta exposure.
ALPHA vs BETA: This is DE-RISKED BETA, not alpha. In strong bull markets it LAGS buy-hold (regime cash drag). Positioning should be framed as drawdown-insurance, not return-maximization.
LIQ-AMPLIFIER: liq_capitulation/liq_short_panic are BULL+CHOP amplifiers (bear edge ~0). They are available in v51 dollar-bar data which requires live Binance liquidation feed.
DATA STALENESS: Panel was 20d stale at last check (2026-05-28 last bar). Refresh data pipeline before any live deployment.
DECAY MONITOR: No DSR/IC-decay monitor wired. Genuine drift (CDAP wave-3) is a known risk pre-promotion gap.
HALTING RULE: No consecutive-DD halt wired in wealth_bot risk_manager (pre-promotion gap).

K3 REGIME-LABEL SHUFFLE KILL: ALL chop TIs survive shuffled labels (LABEL_SHUFFLE_KILL=True). Edge is NOT conditional on the precise regime label -- it is a global continuation bias that happens to be stronger in bull+chop. The regime gate is a GATE (controls exposure), not a signal selector.
blocking_cautions: HIGH REGIME LAG: mean bear-entry lag 23.5 bars. Strategy will hold losing positions ~23.5 days before gating to cash.
